creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Comparably bugged, pages in another book, for example: 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/developers-handbook/parti/>

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/developers-handbook/partv/>

In this case: 

> Part V. Appendices

– an empty page, is followed by: 

> Appendices

– that is _not_ an appendix; it's a 
  bibliography but not subtitled as such and 
  (bug 259371) there's no title.
